AMD 的 Lemonade：使用 GPU 和 NPU 的快速开源本地 LLM 服务器

Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU

lemonade-server.ai 作者 AbuAssar 分数 504 评论 107 2026/04/02 19:04
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 在 GPU 和 NPU 上运行速度快得令人耳目一新 开源。私人的。几分钟内即可在任何 PC 上准备就绪。 128 GB 统一 RAM 可以用来做什么？加载 gpt-oss-120b 或 Qwen-Coder-Next 等模型以供高级工具使用。我应该先调整什么？您可以使用 --no-mmap 来加快加载时间并将上下文大小增加到 64 或更多。图像生成 文艺复兴时期绘画风格的一罐柠檬水 语音 你好，我是你的人工智能助手。今天我能为您做什么？
  2. 由本地 AI 社区为每台 PC 构建的开源代码。 Lemonade 的存在是因为本地人工智能应该是免费、开放、快速和私密的。
  3. 生态系统与出色的应用程序配合使用。由于 OpenAI API 标准，Lemonade 已集成在许多应用程序中，并且可以开箱即用地与数百个应用程序配合使用。
  4. 技术规格专为实际的本地人工智能工作流程而构建。从安装到运行时的所有内容都经过优化，可实现快速设置、广泛的兼容性和本地优先执行。本机 C++ 后端轻量级服务，仅 2MB。一分钟安装 简单的安装程序可自动设置堆栈。 OpenAI API 兼容 可与数百个开箱即用的应用程序配合使用，并在几分钟内完成集成。自动配置您的硬件 配置 GPU 和 NPU 的依赖项。多引擎兼容性可与 llama.cpp、Ryzen AI SW、FastFlowLM 等配合使用。一次运行多个模型 同时运行多个模型。跨平台跨 Windows、Linux 和 macOS（测试版）提供一致的体验。内置应用程序 GUI，可让您快速下载、试用和切换模型。
  5. 统一 API 为每种模式提供一项本地服务。将您的应用程序指向 Lemonade，并使用标准 API 获取聊天、视觉、图像生成、转录、语音生成等功能。

Original Summary

  1. Refreshingly fast on GPUs and NPUs Open source. Private. Ready in minutes on any PC. Chat What can I do with 128 GB of unified RAM? Load up models like gpt-oss-120b or Qwen-Coder-Next for advanced tool use. What should I tune first? You can use --no-mmap to speed up load times and increase context size to 64 or more. Image Generation A pitcher of lemonade in the style of a renaissance painting Speech Hello, I am your AI assistant. What can I do for you today?
  2. Open Source Built by the local AI community for every PC. Lemonade exists because local AI should be free, open, fast, and private.
  3. Ecosystem Works with great apps. Lemonade is integrated in many apps and works out-of-box with hundreds more thanks to the OpenAI API standard.
  4. Tech Specs Built for practical local AI workflows. Everything from install to runtime is optimized for fast setup, broad compatibility, and local-first execution. Native C++ Backend Lightweight service that is only 2MB. One Minute Install Simple installer that sets up the stack automatically. OpenAI API Compatible Works with hundreds of apps out-of-box and integrates in minutes. Auto-configures for your hardware Configures dependencies for your GPU and NPU. Multi-engine compatibility Works with llama.cpp, Ryzen AI SW, FastFlowLM, and more. Multiple Models at Once Run more than one model at the same time. Cross-platform A consistent experience across Windows, Linux, and macOS (beta). Built-in app A GUI that lets you download, try, and switch models quickly.
  5. Unified API One local service for every modality. Point your app at Lemonade and get chat, vision, image gen, transcription, speech gen, and more with standard APIs.

dennemark 2026/04/02 21:10
我已经使用柠檬水近一年了。在 Strix Halo 上我没有使用其他任何东西 - 尽管 kyuz0 的工具箱也很好（https://kyuz0.github.io/amd-strix-halo-toolboxes/）

现在您可以使用 TTS、STT、文本和图像生成以及图像编辑。除了能够通过 rocm、vulkan 或在 CPU、GPU 和 NPU 上运行。有相当多的选择。他们的发展步伐相当好且务实。强烈推荐 AMD 硬件使用此功能！

编辑：OpenAI，我认为现在的 ollama 兼容端点允许我在 VSCode Copilot 以及 Open Web UI 中使用它。他们的文档中显示了更多选项。

I have been using lemonade for nearly a year already. On Strix Halo I am using nothing else - although kyuz0's toolboxes are also nice (https://kyuz0.github.io/amd-strix-halo-toolboxes/)

Nowadays you get TTS, STT, text & image generation and image editing should also be possible. Besides being able to run via rocm, vulkan or on CPU, GPU and NPU. Quite a lot of options. They have a quite good and pragmatic pace in development. Really recommend this for AMD hardware!

Edit: OpenAI and i think nowaday ollama compatible endpoints allow me to use it in VSCode Copilot as well as i.e. Open Web UI. More options are shown in their docs.

sawansri 2026/04/03 03:49
您会得到类似的性能。 Lemonade 被设计为本地 AI 模型的交钥匙软件（针对 AMD 硬件进行了优化）。该软件可帮助您通过单个实用程序管理不同 GenAI 模式的后端（llama.cpp、flm、whispercpp、stable‑diffusion.cpp 等）。

在性能方面，Lemonade 与 ROCm 和 Vulkan 捆绑在一起。这些均来源于 https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/llamacpp-rocm 和 https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases 分别。

You would get similar performance. Lemonade is designed as a turnkey (optimized for AMD Hardware) for local AI models. The software helps you manage backends (llama.cpp, flm, whispercpp, stable‑diffusion.cpp, etc) for different GenAI modalities from a single utility.

On the performance side, lemonade comes bundled with ROCm and Vulkan. These are sourced from https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/llamacpp-rocm and https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases respectively.

dennemark 2026/04/02 23:00
我手头有两台 Strix Halo 设备。私人128GB台式机和工作64GB HP笔记本。 64GB 机器可以加载 Qwen3.5 30B-A3B，使用 VSCode，我猜它需要一些初始提示处理来初始化所有这些工具。但该模型正在与我需要的其他资源进行斗争。所以这些天我已经不再使用它了，但我想在我的家用机器上尝试一下。我只是现在不怎么做这方面的工作。

Lemonade 有一个 Web UI 来设置上下文大小和 llama.cpp 参数，您需要将上下文设置为适当的数字或仅设置为 0，以便它使用默认值。如果它太低，它将无法与代理编码一起使用。

我会尝试一些 Claw 应用程序，但首先需要对该领域进行一些研究。但我在 Open Web UI 上使用不同的模型。 GPT 120B 很快，但 Qwen3.5 27B 也不错。

I have two Strix Halo devices at hand. Privately a framework desktop with 128gb and at work 64GB HP notebook. The 64GB machine can load Qwen3.5 30B-A3B, with VSCode it needs a bit of initial prompt processing to initialize all those tools I guess. But the model is fighting with the other resources that I need. So I am not really using it anymore these days, but I want to experiment on my home machine with it. I just dont work on it much right now.

Lemonade has a Web UI to set the context size and llama.cpp args, you need to set context to proper number or just to 0 so that it uses the default. If its too low, it wont work with agentic coding.

I will try some Claw app, but first need to research the field a bit. But I am using different models on Open Web UI. GPT 120B is fast, but also Qwen3.5 27B is fine.

cpburns2009 2026/04/02 23:16
Qwen3-Coder-Next 在我的 128GB 框架桌面上运行良好。它在 Python 编码方面似乎比 Qwen3.5 35B-A3B 更好，而且速度并没有慢太多（43 tg/s 与 Q4 的 55 tg/s 相比）。

27B 应该非常好，但它太慢了，我放弃了它（第四季度为 11-12 tg/s）。

Qwen3-Coder-Next works well on my 128GB Framework Desktop. It seems better at coding Python than Qwen3.5 35B-A3B, and it's not too much slower (43 tg/s compared to 55 tg/s at Q4).

27B is supposed to be really good but it's so slow I gave up on it (11-12 tg/s at Q4).

vlowther 2026/04/03 04:33
qwen3-coder-next 的 8 位 MLX unsloth Quant 似乎是具有 128GB 内存的 MBB M5 Max 上的局部最佳值。 通过 oMLX 进行提示缓存，我可以相当合理地并行运行两个任务来执行不同的任务。我发现，在上下文中出现大约 170k 个代币后，较低的量化分析师往往会失去情节。
The 8 bit MLX unsloth quant of qwen3-coder-next seems to be a local best on an MBB M5 Max with 128GB memory. With oMLX doing prompt caching I can run two in parallel doing different tasks pretty reasonably. I found that lower quants tend to lose the plot after about 170k tokens in context.

lrvick 2026/04/03 01:32
作为另一个数据点。

使用 Vulcan llama.cpp 在 Framework 台式机主板 (Strix Halo 128) 上的内核 7.0.0rc5 上以 35t/s 的速度运行 Qwen3.5 122B 作为日常驱动程序。

还有一对 AMD AI Pro r9700 卡作为我的 zimageturbo、qwen tts/asr 和其他辅助功能和实验的主力。

最后有一个 Radeon 6900 XT 以 60+t/s 的速度运行 qwen3.5 32B，成为快速的全能选手。

如果我购买任何 nvidia 的东西，它只会用于兼容性测试。对于家庭用户来说，AMD 硬件目前 100% 是成本、自由度和安全性的最佳选择。

As another data point.

Running Qwen3.5 122B at 35t/s as a daily driver using Vulcan llama.cpp on kernel 7.0.0rc5 on a Framework Desktop board (Strix Halo 128).

Also a pair of AMD AI Pro r9700 cards as my workhorses for zimageturbo, qwen tts/asr and other accessory functions and experiments.

Finally have a Radeon 6900 XT running qwen3.5 32B at 60+t/s for a fast all arounder.

If I buy anything nvidia it will be only for compatibility testing. AMD hardware is 100% the best option now for cost, freedom, and security for home users.

我在 7900 XTX 上运行本地法学硕士几个月了，ROCm 体验一直......很艰难。 AMD 支持处理驱动程序/依赖项迷宫的官方推理服务器这一事实是巨大的。我最大的问题是 NPU 支持——与仅使用 dGPU 相比，是否有人真正从 Ryzen AI NPU 获得了有意义的吞吐量？在我的测试中，NPU 主要是小型模型之外的任何事物的瓶颈。
Been running local LLMs on my 7900 XTX for months and the ROCm experience has been... rough. The fact that AMD is backing an official inference server that handles the driver/dependency maze is huge. My biggest question is NPU support - has anyone actually gotten meaningful throughput from the Ryzen AI NPU vs just using the dGPU? In my testing the NPU was mostly a bottleneck for anything beyond tiny models.

> Been running local LLMs on my 7900 XTX for months and the ROCm experience has been... rough.

I only ask because I've been running local models (using Ollama) on my RX 7900 XTX for the last year and a half or so and haven't had a single problem that was ROCm specific that I can think of. Actually, I've barely had any problems at all, other than the card being limited to 24GB of VRAM. :-(

I'm halfway tempted to splurge on a Radeon Pro board to get more VRAM, but ... haven't bitten the bullet yet.

skirmish 2026/04/03 10:28
当超出 VRAM 时，您的硬件是否完全锁定？ 我的 7900XTX 上有很多 llama.cpp（Arch Linux，各种驱动程序版本）。 一旦我输入的数量和上下文大小不超过 VRAM，它就稳定了；在此之前我说了很多脏话，并不断地按硬件重置按钮。
Did you have complete hardware lockups when VRAM is exceeded? I had quite a few on my 7900XTX with llama.cpp (Arch Linux, various driver versions). Once I dial in the quant and context size that never exceed VRAM, it is stable; before that I swear a lot and keep pressing the hardware reset button.

mindcrime 2026/04/03 11:01
没有。我已经多次超出可用 VRAM，除了重新启动 Ollama 之外，从来不需要做任何事情。但公平地说，就初始模型加载而言，这“超出了可用 VRAM”（例如，使用永远不会在 24GB 中加载的模型）。我不知道我是否曾经开始使用成功加载的模型，然后通过将内容推入上下文来推过可用的 VRAM。

我经历过一些“模型精神病”事件，其中背景变得如此之大，以至于模型失去了所有连贯性并开始吐出胡言乱语。这些总是很有趣。

Nope. I've exceeded available VRAM a few times, and never had to do anything other than maybe restart Ollama. To be fair though, that's "exceed available VRAM" in terms of the initial model load (eg, using a model that would never load in 24GB). I don't know that I've ever started working with a successfully loaded model and then pushed past available VRAM by pushing stuff into the context.

I've had a few of those "model psychosis" incidents where the context gets so big that the model just loses all coherence and starts spewing gibberish though. Those are always fun.

在 HN 中查看
dlcarrier 2026/04/03 08:51
NPU 不是只能在小型机型上运行吗？ 据我所知，大多数 NPU 不具备与 GPU 或 CPU 共享工作负载的架构，这比 GPU 或 CPU 之间共享工作负载的架构要好得多。 （一种例外是由 CPU 执行的 NPU 指令，例如带有 IME 指令的 RISC-V 内核被称为 NPU，这会加速 CPU 上已经发生的操作。）

您可以在 GPU、CPU 和 NPU 之间共享工作负载，但需要提前按比例分配；这不是那种容易实现自动化的事情。 此外，GPU 通常比 CPU 或 NPU 快几个数量级，因此增益很小，或者完全被移动数据的开销所抵消。

拆分工作负载的最大优势通常是利用专用 RAM，例如在 VRAM 较低但系统 RAM 充足的系统上，稳定的扩散工作负载可能会将潜像从 VRAM 移动到系统 RAM 并在那里执行 VAE，而不是在 GPU 上。 有了统一内存，就不需要了。

Aren't NPUs only designed to run on small models? From whast I've seen, most NPUs don't have the architecture to share workloads with a GPU or CPU any better than a GPU or CPU can share workloads with each other. (One exemption being NPU instructions that are executed by the CPU, e.g. RISC-V cores with IME instructions being called NPUs, which speed up operations already happening on the CPU.)

You can share workloads between a GPU, CPU, and NPU, but it needs to be proportionally parceled out ahead of time; it's not the kind of thing that's easy to automate. Also, the GPU is generally orders of magnitude faster than the CPU or NPU, so the gains would be minimal, or completely nullified by the overhead of moving data around.

The largest advantage of splitting workloads is often to take advantage of dedicated RAM, e.g. stable diffusion workloads on a system with low VRAM but plenty of system RAM may move the latent image from VRAM to system RAM and perform VAE there, instead of on the GPU. With unified memory, that isn't needed.

suprjami 2026/04/03 04:50
你一定是在开玩笑。

无论是在空闲状态还是在使用过程中，我的三张 NVIDIA 卡都比我的一张 AMD 卡更加节能。

官方ROCm就像拔牙一样，对桌面卡的支持很差。 Debian 是一个志愿者主导的项目，拥有比 AMD 更好的 ROCm CI，并且支持更多卡。

查看任何基准。 NV 中端卡比 AMD 快，至少领先一代。拥有 7900XTX 是令人尴尬的失望。

我喜欢AMD并希望他们成功，但他们在这方面远远落后于NV。

You have got to be joking.

My three NVIDIA cards are more power efficient than my one AMD card, both at idle and during usage.

Official ROCm is like pulling teeth with poor support for desktop cards. Debian, a volunteer led project, have better ROCm CI than AMD and support more cards.

Look at any benchmarks. NV midrange cards are faster than AMD and at least a generation in front. Owning a 7900XTX is an embarrassing disappointment.

I like AMD and want them to succeed, but they are way behind NV in this area.

roenxi 2026/04/03 08:03
> 官方ROCm就像拔牙一样，对桌面卡的支持很差......

我同意你的大部分帖子，并且由于机器学习的情况，不久前逃离了 AMD 生态系统，但他们的问题似乎更多是计算着色器的固件错误和内存管理，而不是更高级别的库。

对于这个问题，最明显的解决方案是不使用 ROCm。对于小用户来说，ROCm 一直有点像火车残骸，而且它似乎并没有做任何特别的事情。前进的方向将更像是今天的链接指向的服务器似乎正在使用的 Vulkan。管理不善的软件包的存在并不意味着用户必须使用它，他们可以使用替代方案。

如果 AMD 能解决好自己的问题就好了。 Linux 上的 NVidia 驱动程序情况很痛苦，如果 AMD 可以在没有硬件锁定的情况下可靠地运行 LLM，那么我宁愿重新使用他们的产品。

> Official ROCm is like pulling teeth with poor support for desktop cards...

I agree with most of your post and fled the AMD ecosystem some time ago because of the machine learning situation, but their problem seemed to be more the firmware bugs and memory management of compute shaders than the higher level libraries.

The obvious solution to this one would be not to use ROCm. ROCm has always been a bit of a train wreck for small users and it doesn't seem to do anything special anyway. The way forward would be something more like Vulkan which the server that today's link points to seems to be using. The existence of a badly managed software package doesn't really imply that users have to use it, they can use an alternative.

It would be nice if AMD sorts themselves out though. The NVidia driver situation on linux is painful and if AMD can reliably run LLMs without the hardware locking then I'd much rather move back to using their products.

在 HN 中查看
suprjami 2026/04/03 11:06
是的，AMD 自己甚至在其营销材料中使用了 Vulkan tg 编号，因为在 RDNA2 及以上的所有产品上它都比 ROCm 更快（看起来很尴尬）。

然而，对于 pp，Vulkan 仍与 ROCm 相距甚远。这对于长上下文和/或快速响应很重要。很多人真的很关心首次获得令牌的时间。

Yes, AMD themselves even use Vulkan tg numbers in their marketing material, because it's faster than ROCm on everything RDNA2 onwards (seems embarrassing).

However for pp, Vulkan is still nowhere near close to ROCm. That matters for long context and/or quick response. A lot of people really care about that time-to-first-token.

lrvick 2026/04/03 11:38
拥有一台 Strix Halo 128，在 400w PSU 上使用 Vulkan 和内核 7.0.0 以 35t/s 的速度运行 Qwen 3.5 122b。在我看来，在价格和功耗方面很难被击败。但公平地说，我自己编译了所有内容，因此 nvidia 所需的专有驱动程序对我来说是不可能的。
Have a Strix Halo 128 running Qwen 3.5 122b at 35t/s using Vulkan and kernel 7.0.0 on a 400w PSU. Pretty hard to beat for the price and power consumption IMO. But to be fair I compile everything myself so proprietary drivers required by nvidia are a non starter for me.

sensitiveCal 2026/04/02 20:59
感觉它介于 Ollama 和 LM Studio 之间，但更注重成为统一的“运行时”而不仅仅是模型服务。

对我来说，有趣的部分不仅仅是本地推理，还有它试图处理多少编排（文本、图像、音频等）。这通常是在本地运行模型时事情变得混乱的地方。

很好奇其中有多少实际上是抽象，而不是仅仅将多个工具捆绑在一起。还想知道 AMD/NPU 优化最终是否会使其在实践中与 Ollama 之类的东西相比不太便携。

Feels like this is sitting somewhere between Ollama and something like LM Studio, but with a stronger focus on being a unified “runtime” rather than just model serving.

The interesting part to me isn’t just local inference, but how much orchestration it’s trying to handle (text, image, audio, etc). That’s usually where things get messy when running models locally.

Curious how much of this is actually abstraction vs just bundling multiple tools together. Also wondering if the AMD/NPU optimizations end up making it less portable compared to something like Ollama in practice.

在 HN 中查看
RealFloridaMan 2026/04/02 22:34
它捆绑了工具、模型选择和整体管理。

它是可移植的，因为它可以使用 CPU 或 vulkan 后端安装在任何受支持的操作系统上。但它仅支持开箱即用的 ROCM 构建和 AMD NPU。如果您想在 CUDA 上运行 llama.cpp 版本，可以通过一种方法来覆盖它使用的 llama.cpp 版本，但这会增加更多的管理开销。

如果您有一台 AMD 机器并且希望以最小的麻烦运行本地模型……这确实是最简单的方法。

它在我的 NAS 上运行，处理我的家庭助理设置。

我有一个 strix halo 和另一台运行各种 CUDA 卡的服务器，我通过更新到 llama.cpp 或 vllm 的前沿版本来手动管理。

It bundles tools, model selection, and overall management.

It’s portable in the sense it will install on any of the supported OS using CPU or vulkan backends. But it only supports out of the box ROCM builds and AMD NPUs. There is a way to override which llama.cpp version it uses if you want to run it on CUDA, but that adds more overhead to manage.

If you have an AMD machine and want to run local models with minimal headache…it’s really the easiest method.

This runs on my NAS, handles my home assistant setup.

I have a strix halo and another server running various CUDA cards I manage manually by updating to bleeding edge versions of llama.cpp or vllm.

zozbot234 2026/04/02 21:00
这不会给你 NPU 支持，它依赖于 https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM 。这就是说“NPU 加速内核是专有的二进制文件”，而不是开源的。
That won't give you NPU support, which relies on https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM . And that says "NPU-accelerated kernels are proprietary binaries", not open source.

在 HN 中查看
zozbot234 2026/04/02 23:26
AMD/Xilinx对NPU的软件支持是完全开放的，只有FFLM的模型是专有的。看 https://github.com/amd/iron https://github.com/Xilinx/mlir-aie https://github.com/amd/RyzenAI-SW/ 。探索是否可以使用 Vulkan Compute 简单地为这些 NPU 开发内核并以这种方式驱动它们，这将是一件很好的事情；这将为 GPU 的现有跨平台支持提供最紧密的统一。
AMD/Xilinx's software support for the NPU is fully open, it's only FFLM's models that are proprietary. See https://github.com/amd/iron https://github.com/Xilinx/mlir-aie https://github.com/amd/RyzenAI-SW/ . It would be nice to explore whether one can simply develop kernels for these NPU's using Vulkan Compute and drive them that way; that would provide the closest unification with the existing cross-platform support for GPU's.
在 HN 中查看
steffs 2026/04/03 05:47
多模式捆绑是比原始推理速度更突出的部分。如果您正在构建一个需要文本生成、图像生成和语音识别的应用程序，那么现在本地设置是三个独立的服务，具有三个不同的 API 和三个不同的模型管理故事。对于任何在本地进行原型设计的人来说，让一台服务器处理 OpenAI 兼容端点背后的所有工作都是真正的生活质量改善。 NPU 的角度很有趣，但对于大多数用例来说可能被夸大了。线程中的讨论证实了我的预期：NPU 适合小型始终在线模型和预填充卸载，而不适合大多数人关心的聊天机器人工作负载。真正引人注目的地方在于，AMD 能否使 GPU 加上 NPU 调度的组合足够透明，以便开发人员无需考虑哪个硬件正在运行管道的哪个部分。这在任何平台上都还不是一个已解决的问题，如果 Lemonade 能够正确处理一小部分工作负载，那么无论它在纯文本生成方面与 Ollama 进行基准测试如何，它都会成为 AMD 硬件上的默认选择。
The multi-modal bundling is the part that stands out more than the raw inference speed. If you are building an app that needs text generation, image generation, and speech recognition, right now the local setup is three separate services with three different APIs and three different model management stories. Having one server handle all of that behind OpenAI-compatible endpoints is a real quality of life improvement for anyone prototyping locally. The NPU angle is interesting but probably overstated for most use cases. The discussion in the thread confirms what I would expect: NPUs shine for small always-on models and prefill offloading, not for the chatbot workloads most people care about. Where this gets genuinely compelling is if AMD can make the combined GPU plus NPU scheduling transparent enough that developers do not need to think about which hardware is running which part of the pipeline. That is not a solved problem on any platform yet, and if Lemonade gets it right for even a subset of workloads, it becomes the default choice on AMD hardware regardless of how it benchmarks against Ollama on pure text generation.

在 HN 中查看
RealFloridaMan 2026/04/02 22:41
这是开始和维护专注于 AMD 优化的本地 AI 堆栈的简单方法。它是 sst、tts、图像生成和普通 LLM 端点的一站式安装。它有自己的 webui，用于管理和与端点交互。

它还具有与 OpenAI、Ollama 和 Anthropic 兼容的端点，因此您可以使用与这些兼容的任何工具，它就会运行。

It’s an easy way to get started and maintain a local AI stack that concentrates on AMD optimization. It is a one stop install for endpoints for sst, tts, image generation, and normal LLM. It has its own webui for management and interacting with the endpoints.

It also has endpoints that are compatible with OpenAI, Ollama, and Anthropic so you can throw any tool that is compatible with those and it will just run.

在 HN 中查看
0x457 2026/04/03 01:26
它是 LM Studio 的替代方案，因为它是多个运行时的抽象。 AMD 的部分是它支持 FastFlowML 运行时，这是在 Linux 上的 Ryzen AI CPU 上利用 NPU 的唯一方法。
It's alternative to LM Studio in a way that it's an abstraction over multiple runtimes. AMD part is that it supports FastFlowML runtime which is the only way to utilize NPU on Ryzen AI CPUs on linux.

zelphirkalt 2026/04/02 21:02
我认为 LM Studio 本身使用其他软件来真正利用 LLM。如果其他软件不支持您的 NPU，那么您将无法从这些软件中获得太多性能。我猜这个 Lemonade 是 LM Studio 可以使用的另一种软件。
I think LM Studio itself uses other software to actually make use of LLMs. If that other software does not support your NPUs, then you are not going to get much performance out of those. This Lemonade thing I am guessing is one such other software, that LM Studio could be using.

rpdillon 2026/04/02 21:13
我的 Strix Halo 盒子上放柠檬水已经有一段时间了。它发送到它们包含的其他后端，例如扩散和骆驼。事实上，我不喜欢他们的组合服务器，我使用的是他们为 ROCm 构建的 llama CPP。

https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/llamacpp-rocm

但我不会对图像或音频做任何事情。我使用 GPT OSS 120B 每秒获得​​大约 50 个代币。正如其他人指出的那样，NPU 用于“始终开启”的低功耗小型模型，因此对于标准聊天机器人用例而言，这并不是一个巨大的胜利。

Been running lemonade for some time on my Strix Halo box. It dispatches out to other backends that they include, like diffusion and llama. I actually don't like their combined server, and what I use instead is their llama CPP build for ROCm.

https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/llamacpp-rocm

But I'm not doing anything with images or audio. I get about 50 tokens a second with GPT OSS 120B. As others have pointed out, the NPU is used for low-powered, small models that are "always on", so it's not a huge win for the standard chatbot use case.

在 HN 中查看
zozbot234 2026/04/02 21:24
即使是小型 NPU 也可以从预填充中卸载一些计算，这在较长的上下文中可能会非常昂贵。 目前尚不清楚它们是否可以在解码过程中直接提供帮助；这取决于它们是否能够以良好的吞吐量访问内存并在内部进行取消量化+计算，就像 GPU 一样。 Apple Neural Engine 仅执行 INT8 或 FP16 MADD 运算，因此这大多没有帮助。
Even small NPUs can offload some compute from prefill which can be quite expensive with longer contexts. It's less clear whether they can help directly during decode; that depends on whether they can access memory with good throughput and do dequant+compute internally, like GPUs can. Apple Neural Engine only does INT8 or FP16 MADD ops, so that mostly doesn't help.

RealFloridaMan 2026/04/02 22:44
它针对不同 API 之间的兼容性进行了优化，并且具有针对 AMD GPU 和 NPU 的特定硬件构建。它由 AMD 运行。

在底层，它们都运行 llama.cpp，但它针对不同的 GPU 有特定的构建。不确定 9070 是否是其中之一，我正在 370 和 395 APU 上运行它。

It is optimized for compatibility across different APIs as well as has specific hardware builds for AMD GPUs and NPUs. It’s run by AMD.

Under the hood they are both running llama.cpp, but this has specific builds for different GPUs. Not sure if the 9070 is one, I am running it on a 370 and 395 APU.

So it seems faster in this very limited test.

LumielGR 2026/04/02 22:11
Lemonade 使用 llama.cpp 进行文本和视觉处理，并进行夜间 ROCm 构建。它还可以同时加载和服务多个法学硕士。它还可以创建图像，或使用whisper.cpp，或使用TTS模型，或使用NPU（例如Strix Halo amdxdna2）等等！
Lemonade is using llama.cpp for text and vision with a nightly ROCm build. It can also load and serve multiple LLMs at the same time. It can also create images, or use whisper.cpp, or use TTS models, or use NPU (e.g Strix Halo amdxdna2), and more!

在 HN 中查看
naasking 2026/04/03 01:36
据我了解，ROCm 有很多 bug，并且在 7.x 系列的许多 GPU 上都有一些性能下降。 LLM 的 Vulkan 表现显然并不落后于 ROCm，而且目前更加稳定和可预测。
From what I understand, ROCm is a lot buggier and has some performance regressions on a lot of GPUs in the 7.x series. Vulkan performance for LLMs is apparently not far behind ROCm and is far more stable and predictable at this time.
在 HN 中查看
0x457 2026/04/03 01:30
对我来说，Vulkan 在集成卡上表现更好，但 ROCm (MIGraphX) 在 7900 XTX 上表现更好。
For me Vulkan performs better on integrated cards, but ROCm (MIGraphX) on 7900 XTX.
在 HN 中查看
hrmtst93837 2026/04/03 00:06
错误层。 Vulkan 是一个图形和计算 API，而 Lemonade 是一个 LLM 服务器，因此比较它们就像将套接字与 nginx 进行比较一样有意义。如果您的目标是运行本地模型而不自己编写一半的堆栈，请将 Lemonade 与 Ollama 或 vLLM 进行比较。
Wrong layer. Vulkan is a graphics and compute API, while Lemonade is an LLM server, so comparing them makes about as much sense as comparing sockets to nginx. If your goal is to run local models without writing half the stack yourself, compare Lemonade to Ollama or vLLM.
在 HN 中查看
metalliqaz 2026/04/03 00:42
我正在谈论 ROCm 与 Vulkan。 在 AMD GPU 上，Vulkan 一段时间以来被普遍认为是速度更快的 API。 由于大多数托管项目完全专注于 Nvidia，因此两者都比 CUDA 慢。 父帖子似乎表明较新的 ROCm 版本更好。
I was talking about ROCm vs Vulkan. On AMD GPUs, Vulkan has been commonly recognized as the faster API for some time. Both have been slower than CUDA due to most of the hosting projects focusing entirely on Nvidia. Parent post seemed to indicate that newer ROCm releases are better.
在 HN 中查看
naasking 2026/04/03 01:39
是的，由于一些 ROCm 回归，Vulkan 目前速度更快： https://github.com/ROCm/ROCm/issues/5805#issuecomment-414161...

如果 ROCm 解决了这些问题，最终应该会更快。

Yes, Vulkan is currently faster due to some ROCm regressions: https://github.com/ROCm/ROCm/issues/5805#issuecomment-414161...

ROCm should be faster in the end, if they ever fix those issues.

Just in case anyone isn't aware. NPUs are low power, slow, and meant for small models.

jcgrillo 2026/04/03 00:36
我想知道想象中的用例是什么？说实话，我曾认真考虑过购买框架台式机，但 NPU 让我望而却步。我不明白为什么我必须花钱购买一堆没有任何作用的芯片。现在有了一些软件支持...它仍然没有任何作用？那么它为什么还要存在呢？
I wonder what was the imagined use case? TBH I was seriously thinking about buying a framework desktop but the NPU put me off.. I don't get why I should have to pay money for a bunch of silicon that doesn't do anything. And now that there's some software support... it still doesn't do anything? Why does it even exist at all then?
在 HN 中查看
ThatPlayer 2026/04/03 06:35
至少部分原因可能是 Microsoft 对 Copilot+ 徽章的 40 TOPS NPU 要求。英特尔在其现代 CPU 中也配备了 NPU。手机 CPU 制造商这样做的时间更长，尽管谷歌称他们为 TPU。

我使用在我的家庭实验室中运行的较旧的 Google Coral TPU，Frigate NVR 使用它来检测安全摄像头的对象。与在 GPU 上运行相比，它更高效，但灵活性较差。

不知道我的日常驾驶计算机是否需要一个 NPU，但我希望为我的下一台家庭服务器配备一个 NPU。

At least part of it is probably Microsoft's 40 TOPS NPU requirement for their Copilot+ badge. Intel also have NPUs in their modern CPUs. Phones CPU manufacturers have been doing it even longer, though Google calls theirs TPU.

I use an older Google Coral TPU running in my home lab being used by Frigate NVR for object detection for security cameras. It's more efficient, but less flexible than running it on the GPU.

Don't know if I need an NPU for my daily driver computer, but I would want one for my next home server.

在 HN 中查看
cpburns2009 2026/04/03 02:11
NPU 对于 Framework Desktop 以及所有 Strix Halo 设备来说完全没用。它可能有用的地方是带有 @naasking 提到的示例的手机（音频文本和文本音频处理），​​也许还有物联网。
The NPU is entirely useless for the Framework Desktop, and really all Strix Halo devices. Where it could be useful is cell phones with the examples mentioned by @naasking (audio-text and text-audio processing), and maybe IoT.
在 HN 中查看
naasking 2026/04/03 02:02
小模型并非完全无用，据我所知，NPU 可以运行高达 8B 参数左右的 LLM。因此，它们可能有用的一种方式是：Qwen3 文本到语音模型均在 2B 参数下，而 Open AI 的耳语小语音到文本模型在 1B 参数下，因此您可以拥有一个可以与之交谈并可以回话的 AI 代理，理论上，您可以将所有音频文本和文本音频处理卸载到低功耗 NPU，并让 GPU 来完成所有 LLM 处理。
Small models aren't entirely useless, and the NPU can run LLMs up to around 8B parameters from what I've seen. So one way they could be useful: Qwen3 text to speech models are all under 2B parameters, and Open AI's whisper-small speech to text model is under 1B parameters, so you could have an AI agent that you could talk to and could talk back, where, in theory, you could offload all audio-text and text-audio processing to the low power NPU and leave the GPU to do all of the LLM processing.
在 HN 中查看
zozbot234 2026/04/03 02:15
您始终可以将某些层卸载到 NPU 以降低功耗，并将其余层留给 GPU。如果后者是功率节流的（常见于预填充，而不是解码），这将是性能的改进。
You could always offload some layers to the NPU for lower power use and leave the rest to the GPU. If the latter is power throttled (common for prefill, not for decode) that will be a performance improvement.
在 HN 中查看
jcgrillo 2026/04/03 04:58
这似乎是一个非常利基的用例，并且可能不值得表面积？考虑到普通设备处理语音输入的计算时间只占一小部分，因此节省的电量必须非常惊人才能证明其合理性。我敢打赌，90% 的 siri/ok google/whatever 用户每天发出的语音查询次数少于 10 次。他们在普通硬件上运行时可以使用多少电量？这可能有多重要？
That seems like a really niche use case, and probably not worth the surface area? The power savings would have to be truly astonishing to justify it, given what a small fraction of compute time your average device spends processing voice input. I'd wager the 90th percentile siri/ok google/whatever user issues less than 10 voice queries per day. How much power can they use running on normal hardware and how much could it possibly matter?

在 HN 中查看
cpburns2009 2026/04/02 22:54
NPU 使用 FastFlowLM [1] 在 Strix Halo 上的 Linux（至少是 Arch）上工作。不过，他们的 NPU 内核是专有的（可免费获得合理数量的商业收入）。基本上可以免费运行一些模型（使用 NPU 而不是 CPU/GPU），这很好，但性能却很差劲。 NPU 的目标是真正的低功耗设备，如果您拥有像 Strix Halo 这样的 APU/GPU ，则没有用处。

[1]： https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM

The NPU works on Linux (Arch at least) on Strix Halo using FastFlowLM [1]. Their NPU kernels are proprietary though (free up to a reasonable amount of commercial revenue). It's neat you can run some models basically for free (using NPU instead of CPU/GPU), but the performance is underwhelming. The target for NPUs is really low power devices, and not useful if you have an APU/GPU like Strix Halo.

[1]: https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM

这样软件的采用将非常有限。

It's pretty annoying that you need vendor specific APIs and a large vendor specific stack to do anything with those NPUs.

This way software adoption will be very limited.

在 HN 中查看
RealFloridaMan 2026/04/02 22:48
他们在底层使用最新的 llama.cpp，但专为特定 AMD GPU 硬件而构建。

Lemonade 实际上只是一个管理平面/代理。它将 ollama/anthropic API 转换为 llama.cpp 的 OpenAI 格式。它运行不同的后端来进行 sst/tts 和图像生成。让您在一个地方管理这一切。

They use the latest llama.cpp under the hood but built for specific AMD GPU hardware.

Lemonade is really just a management plane/proxy. It translates ollama/anthropic APIs to OpenAI format for llama.cpp. It runs different backends for sst/tts and image generation. Lets you manage it all in one place.

ozgrakkurt 2026/04/03 14:05
对于有 AMD 卡的人。这就是垃圾，rocm就是垃圾。只需安装 llama.cpp 并使用 vulkan 选项运行 llama-server 即可。这只是一些放在上面的垃圾 + JS/Electron 垃圾。
For people with AMD card. This is garbage, rocm is garbage. Just install llama.cpp and run llama-server with vulkan option. This is just some slop + JS/Electron garbage put on top.
